chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, Date For orders as to maintainability of petition 14.O4.2025. CE JUDGE Order with signature of the iudge KARACHI C.P.No.D-5075 of 2023 Mr. Muhammad Imad Qamar, advocate for petitioner Learned counsel for petitioner does not press this petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed alongwith pending application(s). k
